name: German Cabbage Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, onion flakes, and celery seed until well combined.
2. Add the grated cabbage to the dry ingredients and stir until evenly distributed.
3. Whisk the eggs, milk, and melted butter in another bowl until smooth.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the bowl with the dry ingredients and stir quickly for no more than 10 seconds.
5. Grease a muffin pan and divide the batter among the cups.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are cooked through.
Serves: 12
